purpose: Run a PCI-DSS v4.0 compliance audit against AWS and Azure infrastructure covering network security, cardholder data protection, access control, and logging.
description: Evaluates AWS and Azure against PCI-DSS v4.0. Covers: network segmentation (Req 1), cardholder data (Req 3 & 4), access control (Req 7 & 8), logging (Req 10), vulnerability management (Req 6 & 11). Each provider is audited independently. Not for SOC 2, ISO, HIPAA, or GDPR.
capabilities: evaluate AWS network security controls against PCI-DSS Requirement 1
evaluate Azure network security groups against PCI-DSS Requirement 1
check cardholder data protection for Requirements 3 and 4 (encryption, TLS)
audit access controls for Requirements 7 and 8 (least privilege, MFA, IAM/RBAC)
verify audit logging for Requirement 10 (CloudTrail, GuardDuty, Azure diagnostics)
assess vulnerability management for Requirements 6 and 11
context_descriptions: network security controls — security groups, NACLs, VPC flow logs
cardholder data protection — encryption at rest and in transit, TLS, KMS
access control inventory — IAM policies, MFA, least-privilege role assignments
audit logging configuration — CloudTrail, GuardDuty, CloudWatch alarms
